highlights.title: Current company product plugin
highlights.description: Designed and worked on US based client for Revit suite including hangers, spooling, content manager, renumbering, autoscaling, and fittings flip.
highlights.impact: Enabled 60x faster spooling and reduced drafting errors.

highlights.title: Backend Development
highlights.description: Built backend using ASP.NET Core, REST APIs, and Swagger.

highlights.title: Licensing System
highlights.description: Implemented SQL-based licensing using Entity Framework.

highlights.title: Automation Tool
highlights.description: Developed a C# automation tool using HTML parsing and Selenium WebDriver.
highlights.impact: Automated large-scale content downloads and data extraction.

highlights.title: WinForms to WPF Migration
highlights.description: Migrated WinForms applications to WPF using MVVM architecture.

highlights.title: CI/CD Automation
highlights.description: Set up CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins.
highlights.impact: Enabled Revit build automation and versioning.

highlights.title: Cross-Version Compatibility
highlights.description: Maintained compatibility across Revit 2021–2026 and migrated .NET Framework 4.8 to .NET Core 8.
highlights.impact: Reduced installer size from 1.5 GB to 75 MB.

highlights.title: Something
highlights.description: Created SOPs and PFMEAs for manufacturing processes.
